back_translation: Therefore, my beloved brothers and sisters, those who are longed-for by me, my joy and crown, stand firm steadfastly in Lord Jesus in this way, my beloved
I urge Euodia, and I urge Syntyche, to think the same way in Lord Jesus

Yes, I also ask you, my true yokefellow, to help these women, who have struggled for the gospel together with me, along with Clement and the rest of my fellow workers, whose names are in the Book of Life
Always rejoice in Lord Jesus; I will say it again — rejoice
Let your gentleness be apparent to all people; Lord Jesus is near already
Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything, present the things that you desire to God by prayer and petition, together with thanksgiving
Then the peace of God, which surpasses the understanding of human beings, will guard your hearts and your minds in Lord Jesus Christ

Finally, brothers and sisters, whatever is true, whatever is honorable, whatever is righteous, whatever is pure, whatever is lovely, whatever is praiseworthy — if anything is virtue and if anything is worthy of praise — think on these things
Whatever you have learned and received and heard and seen in me, do these things; then God of peace will dwell with you
I rejoiced in Lord Jesus greatly because at last you have come back to show concern for me again; you were already concerned for me, but had no opportunity to express it
I do not say this because of need, for I have learned to be content in whatever situation I am in

I know how to live in poverty and I know how to live in abundance; in every situation and in all things I have learned the secret — both being filled and being hungry, both having more-than-enough and lacking
I am able to do all things through Him who strengthens me
However, you have done well to share in my distress
Philippians, you yourselves know that in the early days of the gospel, when I left Macedonia, no church joined with me in the matter of giving and receiving except you alone
For even when I was at Thessalonica, you sent gifts to help my needs many times
Not that I seek a gift, but I seek the fruit that increases in your account
I have all things and abound; I am filled, having received what you sent through Epaphroditus — a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice, well-pleasing to God
And my God will supply all your needs according to the riches of His in glory, in Lord Jesus Christ
May glory be to God and our Father forever and ever; amen
Greet every saint in Lord Jesus Christ; the brothers and sisters who are with me send greetings to you
All the saints send greetings to you, especially those who are in the household of Caesar
May the grace of Lord Jesus Christ abide with the spirit of you
